top_articles.title: Ivanti Sentry Exploitation Attempts Hitting Honeypots
top_articles.summary: The critical-severity OS command injection vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary code with root privileges.

top_articles.title: ‘GreatXML’ Zero-Day Exploit Bypasses BitLocker
